messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: model_policy_options
Attribute cost_discipline: ability to support many repeated live benchmark runs without wasting provider spend

A (deepseek_v4_flash_fast): Fixed deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash policy for cheap high-volume smoke tests, prompt iteration, and broad first-pass sweeps.

B (glm_5_2_logprob_candidate): Use z-ai/glm-5.2 when logprob support, low prompt cost, and large context matter more than maximum brand credibility.
